list.name: host
list.label: Host
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "monitoring", tag: "host", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "ipmi_sensor", start: -30d)

options.content: **IPMI temps** from pve20 / pve40 / pve55, full 30d. **pve55 R710 BMC disables CPU + planar sensors** — only `ambient_temp` is real for pve55; per-CPU panels show pve20+pve40 only. **Inlet→exhaust ΔT** under steady load is the airflow signal: if it falls over weeks at the same load, a fan is failing or airflow is being obstructed. CPU temps use IPMI sensor names `temp` distinguished by `entity_id` (3.1–3.4 = CPU 1–4).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "monitoring")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ipmi_sensor" and r._field == "value" and r.name == "temp" and r.unit == "degrees_c")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /^${host:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0)
  |> group(columns: ["host"])
  |> max()
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "host"])

from(bucket: "monitoring")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ipmi_sensor" and r.host == "pve55")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "cpu_temp_interf" or r.name == "planar_temp")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["name", "status_desc"])
  |> group()

from(bucket: "monitoring")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ipmi_sensor" and r._field == "value" and r.name == "temp" and r.unit == "degrees_c")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /^${host:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["host", "entity_id"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "host", "entity_id"])

from(bucket: "monitoring")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ipmi_sensor" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "inlet_temp" or r.name == "exhaust_temp")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /^${host:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["host", "name"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "host", "name"])

from(bucket: "monitoring")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ipmi_sensor" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "inlet_temp" or r.name == "exhaust_temp")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /^${host:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "host", "name"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "host"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, host: r.host, _value: r.exhaust_temp - r.inlet_temp }))
  |> group(columns: ["host"])

from(bucket: "monitoring")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ipmi_sensor" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "inlet_temp" or r.name == "ambient_temp")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /^${host:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["host", "name"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "host", "name"])
